description: MCP server with Microsoft 365 email integration via Graph API
name: DLee.MyMCP

environmentVariables.name: AZURE_TENANT_ID
environmentVariables.description: Azure AD tenant ID for Microsoft 365 authentication

environmentVariables.name: AZURE_CLIENT_ID
environmentVariables.description: Azure AD app registration client ID

environmentVariables.name: AZURE_CLIENT_SECRET
environmentVariables.description: Azure AD app registration client secret

repository.url: https://github.com/<your GitHub username here>/<your repo name>
